case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. REYNA I MOLINA BONILLA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BONILLA, REYNA I MOLINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2020 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BONILLA, REYNA I MOLINA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT REYNA I MOLINA BONILLA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00- SERVED DEC-10-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BONILLA, REYNA I MOLINA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
